title: Frog Legs
description: A simple mod that adds a protein drop from each frog variant, including additional food recipes and froglight block variants.
body:
![purequartztools-title](https://i.ibb.co/gF2zpvz/froglegs-title.png)
![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## 📘 About this mod:



**Frog Legs** is a simple mod that adds a protein drop from each frog variant, including additional food recipes and froglight block variants.

This mod is intended to be used alongside my other mods, which I'm calling "**micro-mods**". I aim to combat bloated, overproduced mods with my simplistic, segmented **micro-mods**. Curate your own features without editing confusing config files and disabling recipes. Check my profile to find more mods, and complete your pack!



![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## 📖 What's inside:



**v3.0.0** - Full refactor, ported to 1.21. Added Smooth Froglight Stairs variants. Adjusted Jump Boost effects and nutritional values on all foods.

![purecoppertools_items](https://i.ibb.co/2hLxBb9/froglegs-items.png "Frog Legs - Items")

![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## ✋ FAQ:



**Q: Will you backport to any older versions?**  
**A:** No. I prefer to keep my attention on the latest versions.

**Q: This mod seems like it doesn't add much. Are you going to add more?**  
**A:** The style is meant to be simple and elegant, while being useful. However, if something fits the vibe, I will definitely add it in.

**Q: This mod feels a bit overpowered/underpowered. Is there a config?**  
**A:** There is no config at this time. You can disable the crafting recipe for items/blocks using a datapack. If you have comments about this mod, please join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/X6AsDnqex6) and share your thoughts.

![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)
#### **Leave a comment!**  
#### **Thanks for downloading!**
